stemHtml: Which conditions are the best to create ice crystal icing?

options.a: The most hazardous Ice Crystal Icing conditions can be found in Nimbostratus clouds.
options.b: Ice Crystal Icing is very dangerous when flying large Cirrostratus clouds as they are entirely made of ice crystals.
options.c: Ice Crystal Icing conditions can be found anywhere, even at lower levels, as long as the cloud temperature is below the freezing level.
options.d: Convective cloud with high vertical extent such as a Cumulonimbus containing a high cloud ice water content.
